productDisplayName: DUSG Men's Bharatpur Organic Cotton Green T-shirt
description: Compositionmineral green polo neck t-shirt made of 100% organic 180 GSM cotton with dark green bird print in eco-friendly dye, wooden buttons, ribbed collar, pocket on left chest and green world emblem appliqued on right chestFittingComfortWash care Machine or hand wash at 30 degrees Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not iron on print Soar to the skies in this organic cotton t-shirt from do u speak green, and spread the word of green living. Designed for nature lovers, this mineral green polo tee is made of pure organic cotton, to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. The wooden buttons neatly contrast the dark silhouettes of flying eagles representing the oneness of nature. Team this with jeans and lifestyle shoes for that cool casual look.
